ab: lawkah simu kwara ga, rasun simu musa matisan su yayutas na alang ta riyax sawni.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: aw yu! pakayan sami kayi Atayan ki yutas miyan.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說泰雅語。

ab: sawbih ta tayhuk la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: sawbih tayhuk la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: yutas, muwah sami matayux isu yu.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: wa ! ba simu kamayan kayi ta Atayan ki! tiya kinbalay!
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You guys speak ’Tayal! That’s great!

ab: lawkah simu kwara’ ga,rasun simu pasaba’biru’ musa ma’umah su mayah tarakis.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: aw, pasaba biru.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: uwah babaku hani kwara,lalungi maras ku babingan su pa’umah ki.
ch: A+:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: uwah mabaku hani kwara, langlung maras ku babingun su patayuwaw mamu ki.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: aw, pasaba biru, niya sami malas su babingan pa’umah la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: tayhuk ta la?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini tayhuk na, tuwahi na yu.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: usa’ pasiya siya isu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: aw, halay mu pasiya siya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: usa’ i magan su kuku isu.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: awu, hala kung kamuku.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’ ga, riyax swani ga musa ta i libu’ na sinanan.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: tiya kinbalayi yu! pakusa ta nanu musa kiya?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: pgalu ta su galagan kulu bas.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: inlay pabaku kwara mamu, nama ta mabaziy su kipu han.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: aw.
en: B: Yes.

ab: ti galayng hani ga libu kabahani,ti suru hiya ga sali u’,katayux kiya nanak ki .
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: pasaba’biru mutu kung mangungu u’.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: nay’iri, nan usa matayux kabahani isu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: utux pasapangan witux la ga,waha ta masatana runi ki .
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: aw, mahuway su pasaba biru.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: nanu ku wayan su taxan sawni?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: wayan mu taxan la ku payux na u’,ru payux na kabahani.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: hazi tikay,musa ta la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: na kung tikay,mabaytux ku kuzih mu la.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: hala ta maglu malangiiya aw?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: aw! tila la!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: habayaw ku tayan niya malangiya runi.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: yazik ku siya hasa hiya, asi ta palangiya runi ga asa la.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
